goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'afghan' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'international' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 08:30'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve afghan food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves international food
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
The train should leave on friday and should leave after 08:30
Make sure you get price and travel time
